prompts.text: Show me all custom indices
Show me mappings for the hr-policy-rag-index index
Can I ask coworkers to donate to a personal fundraiser during work hours, or does Mega Corp have a solicitation policy that limits this?
prompts.comment: Queries the company policy RAG index.

prompts.text: What is the policy if two coworkers start dating? Are there disclosure requirements, especially if one person could influence the other's assignments?
prompts.comment: Queries the company policy RAG index.

prompts.text: I drive a company vehicle between sites. What is the official rule for mobile phone calls, texting, or navigation use while driving?
prompts.comment: Queries the company policy RAG index.

prompts.text: Step 1) Navigate to https://markets.businessinsider.com/commodities, collect the current Agriculture prices. Step 2) Write a brief sentence describing the prices. Step 3) Save a draft email: email recipient address = john.doe@megacorp.com, email subject = "Agriculture Prices" and the body of the email = Your brief sentence from step 2 and an actual listing of the Agriculture prices. Include a blank line between your brief sentence and the prices. Put the individual Agriculture prices on separate lines if possible. At the bottom include: "Best wishes," followed by a new line then "Jim Smith"
prompts.comment: Multi-step prompt: scrapes commodity prices, summarizes them, and saves a draft email.

prompts.text: Navigate to https://finance.yahoo.com/lookup/, find the input field that contains the "Quote Lookup" placeholder, use it to search for AAPL and capture any relevant text information including the current stock price. Show me all related information you find. Do not take a screen shot, I am only interested in text.

Navigate to https://dnr.maryland.gov/publiclands/Pages/outdooreduc.aspx. Click on the "Project Butterfly & Bumblebee" link and return a summary of the "Project Butterfly & Bumblebee" page's content for display.
Search the web for the band "Pixies" and show me the top ten results.

I have a csv file I need to fill out for the company Morgan Stanley in New York, New York. Here is the csv file column headers: company_name,company_bio,services_and_products,entity_type,street_address_1,street_address_2,city,state,zip_code,phone_number,website,social_media_facebook,social_media_twitter,social_media_linkedin,social_media_youtube. Based on your knowledge can you help me collect the data.
prompts.comment: First of two prompts — run this one first, then run the next prompt in the list.

prompts.text: That is good. Let us include that in a draft email. Email Recipient: john.doe@megacorp.com, Email Subject: Morgan Stanley and the Body: will be a brief paragraph you write for me on why Morgan Stanley is a great company for purchasing ETFs and Mutual Funds. Under the paragraph include the csv data just as you returned it to me. Please include the appropriate line breaks and new lines in the body.
prompts.comment: Second of two prompts — run this after the Morgan Stanley csv prompt above.

prompts.text: From https://www.bls.gov/cps/cpsaat11.htm, here are the national demographic percentages for Sales managers. Women: 32.9, white: 87.4, Black: 7.8, Asian: 3.1, Latino: 10.2 Search our employees for Department: Sales, Title: Manager, Page size: 20 and write a paragraph or two that describes how my company's employees compare. Afterwards create a draft email to john.doe@megacorp.com with subject: Sales Manager's demographics. Include in the body of the email a reference to the bls url and their stats plus your paragraphs describing how our employees compare.
prompts.comment: Multi-step prompt: compares company demographics to BLS national data and drafts an email.

prompts.text: How many employees in IT are Female?
Search for employees which are in the IT department and have the title of Network Administrator. Sort by age ascending. Show me page number 4 of size 4 and format the results horizontally.
prompts.comment: You can page through the results in your next prompts: "Page 2" then "Page 3" etc..

prompts.text: Complete the following steps: Step 1) List the ALLOWED directory. Step 2) I need employee head count for each department. Run separate count queries for each of the following departments: Accounting, Engineering, Finance, Human Resources, IT, Marketing, Sales. For each department I want to know how many males we have and how many females we have. For each department I want to know how many Asian, Black, Caucasian, Latino we have. Step 3) In .csv format display for each Department, Total count, Male count, Female count, Asian count, Black count, Caucasian count, Latino count. Step 4) create a file named mega_corp_employee_demographics.csv in the ALLOWED directory Step 5) save the .csv data to the new file that was just created named: mega_corp_employee_demographics.csv. Step 6) upload the file to GCS
prompts.comment: Multi-step prompt: gathers department demographics, creates a CSV, and uploads to GCS.

prompts.text: Create a new employee named Randy Broussard.
prompts.comment: First of two prompts — run this one first, then run the next prompt to update the manager.

prompts.text: Update Randy Broussard with a manager id equal to 5520
prompts.comment: Second of two prompts — run this after creating the employee above.

prompts.text: Show me the record of employee 5615, include all fields from the employee's address.
Find all employees with a hire date 2017-09-11
Find employees with termination date 2018-09-29
Show me employee 5386. Include all fields for the employee and all fields for the employee's manager.
Show me all employees who live in arizona
How many employees live in NC
Show me all employees who live in chicago
There are 13 employees who live in Valdosta.
prompts.comment: Tests the agent's ability to verify a stated fact.

prompts.text: How many employees live in 30066
Show me all employees who live in 98101
Show me a list of all states our employees live in, counts of employees per state and percentage of employees in each state. Show results in a table format.
Show me the longitude and latitude of Boston, Massachusetts.
What is 22 plus six, show result in English.
22 に 6 を足すと何になるか、結果を英語で表示します
prompts.comment: Same addition prompt in Japanese.

prompts.text: Upload to the cloud test.txt
Read the GCS file named test.txt
List the contents of the GCS bucket expense_receipts/ directory.
Upload the file Outgoing/20250831_20250913/intellicare_solutions.jpeg to the expense_receipts/20250831_20250913/ Cloud directory.
prompts.comment: Expense receipt images can be found at https://github.com/dbrown725/mcp-human-resources/tree/main/src/main/resources/images and must be placed in the local ALLOWED directory's Outgoing/20250831_20250913 subfolder.

prompts.text: List all files and folders in the allowed directory. Upload all files in the Outgoing/20250831_20250913 directory to the expense_receipts/20250831_20250913 Cloud directory.
prompts.comment: Expense receipt images can be found at https://github.com/dbrown725/mcp-human-resources/tree/main/src/main/resources/images and must be placed in the local ALLOWED directory's Outgoing/20250831_20250913 subfolder.

prompts.text: Summarize the images in the cloud folder: expense_receipts/20250831_20250913
prompts.comment: Expense receipt images must already be uploaded to the GCS bucket. Images can be found at https://github.com/dbrown725/mcp-human-resources/tree/main/src/main/resources/images.

prompts.text: Generate an expense report for the images in the cloud folder: expense_receipts/20250831_20250913
prompts.comment: Expense receipt images must already be uploaded to the GCS bucket. Images can be found at https://github.com/dbrown725/mcp-human-resources/tree/main/src/main/resources/images.

prompts.text: Read the cloud file named expense_receipts/20250831_20250913/expense_report.csv
prompts.comment: The expense_report.csv must already exist in GCS. Run the 'Generate an expense report' prompt first to create it.

prompts.text: Download from the cloud all files in expense_receipts/20250831_20250913 to the Incoming/Attachments folder.
prompts.comment: Expense receipt images must already be uploaded to the GCS bucket. Images can be found at https://github.com/dbrown725/mcp-human-resources/tree/main/src/main/resources/images.

prompts.text: Download from the cloud the file expense_receipts/20250831_20250913/techwave_solutions.jpg to the Incoming/Attachments directory.
prompts.comment: Image can be found at https://github.com/dbrown725/mcp-human-resources/tree/main/src/main/resources/images and must be uploaded to the GCS bucket associated with the back-end server.

prompts.text: Write a draft email addressed to karen@hr.megacorp.com, Subject: Jim Smith's Expense Report 20250831_20250913. Body: Dear Karen, please find attached my expense report and associated expense receipts for the time period 20250831 thru 20250913. Include a brief description of the expense receipts and the related expense report. Sincerely, Jim Smith Attachments: Use all files located in the ALLOWED directory's subdirectory - Incoming/Attachments.
prompts.comment: Multi-step prompt: drafts an email with file attachments from a local directory.

prompts.text: Generate an image of the Marx Brothers as 3D Figurines. Name the file marxBrothers.
Generate an image of a scene from the disney tv show Andor in the style of the french artist jean giraud moebius.
Generate an image named bullRoastRunner. The image should be a bull roast taking place in the Blade Runner universe.
Generate a new image named catCircus. The image should depict a cat in a circus balancing on a ball. Use the original_images/cat-close-up-of-side-profile.webp image as the original input image name.
prompts.comment: Image can be found at https://github.com/dbrown725/mcp-human-resources/tree/main/src/main/resources/images and must be uploaded to the GCS bucket associated with the back-end server.

prompts.text: Generate a badge for employee Randy Broussard with employee number 6000. His image is original_images/randy_broussard.jpg
prompts.comment: Employee images can be found at https://github.com/dbrown725/mcp-human-resources/tree/main/src/main/resources/images and must be uploaded to the GCS bucket associated with the back-end server.

prompts.text: What is the weather like in Alaska?
